title: A dinner with the wealthy you and the current you
subtitle: A longer guided visualisation for sitting across the table from the version of you who already has the wealth and asking her the questions you most need answered.
excerpt: A visualisation practice from Day 28 of the MONEY program. Use to have a real conversation, in imagination, with the wealthy future version of yourself, and to close the gap between you.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 28 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A ten-minute visualisation from Day 28 of the MONEY program. The scene is a dinner, just the two of you. You across from her. The conversation is calm and specific. You leave knowing something you didn't know before.
Sit quietly. Close your eyes. Take three slow breaths, in through the nose, fully out through the mouth.
You are sitting at a table. A small restaurant, or a kitchen you know, or somewhere simple. The lighting is warm. There are two chairs.
She walks in and sits across from you. The wealthy version of you, a few years ahead. She looks like you. She sits easily, without tension.
You look at each other for a moment. She is not impressive in a performance sense. She is just settled. She has stopped waiting to arrive.
Ask her one question. Whatever is most alive for you right now. Listen for her answer without editing it.
She answers. Notice what she says. Notice how she says it, not rushed, not trying to convince you. Just factual. She knows.
Before you leave, she says something to you. Let it come without trying to control it. Take a breath and receive it.
You stand up. She stands too. You are the same height, the same person. She smiles. You walk back out.
Open your eyes. Write down what she said.
Adapted from Day 28 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
